title: Isn't Anyone Alive?
original_title: 生きてるものはいないのか
overview: In a Japanese military hospital, a mysterious pandemic strikes and quickly kills seemingly at random. A group of unconnected individuals must come to terms with their own impending deaths, and the fragile absurdity of life.
